title: A modular mount assembly for a vehicle
abstract: Embodiment of the present invention may relate to a modular mount assembly [100] for housing various component of a vehicle. In a preferred embodiment, the mount assembly may comprise a first side wall [110] and a second side wall [120] having a first set of cavity [130] and a second set of cavity [140], wherein the first set of cavity [130] may be configured to adapt plurality of components, such as a prime mover, a driver pulley [162, 163], a driven pulley [167], a suspension system [155], rear upper and lower subâframes [170, 190] and wherein the second set of cavity [140] may be configured to integrate the modular structure of the modular mount assembly [100] and provide strength for the modular structure.
claims:
Claims We claim: 1. A mount assembly [100] for a vehicle, the mount assembly [100] comprising: - a first set of cavity [130], wherein the first set of cavity [130] is configured to attach - at least one component of the vehicle, at least one shaft [160, 165] and combination thereof, wherein, the at least one component comprising one of, - at least one driver pulley [162], at least one driven pulley [167] and combination thereof connected to the at least one shaft [160, 165], - a suspension system [155], - a rear upper sub-frame [170], and - a rear lower sub-frame [190], wherein the rear lower sub-frame [190] is extended towards the at least one shaft [160, 165] in one of a lateral arrangement, horizontal arrangement and combination thereof. 2. The mount assembly [100] as claimed in claim 1, wherein the at least one component of the vehicle is mounted through at least one sub-mount. 3. The mount assembly [100] as claimed in claim 2, wherein the at least one sub-mount comprises an upper frame mount, a lower frame mount, a suspension mount [150], a swing arm axle mount, and a drive mount. 4. The mount assembly [100] as claimed in claim 1, further comprising a first side wall [110] and a second side wall [120]. 

 The mount assembly [100] as claimed in claim 1, further comprising at least one connecting means for connecting the first side wall [110] and a second side wall [120]. The mount assembly [100] as claimed in claim 1, wherein the driver pulley [162, 163] is driven by a prime mover configured at the modular mount assembly. The mount assembly [100] as claimed in claim 1, wherein said first driver pulley [163] and first driven pulley [167] are connected through a first drive belt. The mount assembly [100] as claimed in claim 1, further comprises a fin surface area [125] configured for maintaining thermal condition of the prime mover. The mount assembly [100] as claimed in claim 1, further comprises a belt tensioner mechanism, wherein said belt tensioner mechanism comprises a tension adjustor mechanism and at least one idler pulley. The mount assembly [100] as claimed in claim 1, wherein said idler pulley is connected to a first drive belt. The mount assembly [100] as claimed in claim 1, further comprising a connector rod for connecting the rear upper sub-frame [170] and the rear lower sub-frame [190].
